---
title: ""
toc: false
editor: source
---


```{r load_packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(fontawesome)
library(gsheet)
library(gt)
library(gtExtras)
library(tidyverse)

# Helper: render one publication entry as markdown
render_entry <- function(p, use_pdf_col = FALSE, row_id = "0") {
  # Title linked to URL
  title_link <- if (!is.na(p$url) && p$url != "") {
    paste0("[**", p$title, "**](", p$url, ")")
  } else {
    paste0("**", p$title, "**")
  }

  # Build links
  links <- character(0)
  if (use_pdf_col && !is.na(p$pdf) && p$pdf != "") {
    links <- c(links, paste0("[pdf](/publications/", p$pdf, ")"))
  } else if (!use_pdf_col && !is.na(p$url) && p$url != "") {
    links <- c(links, paste0("[pdf](", p$url, ")"))
  }
  if (!is.na(p$github) && p$github != "") links <- c(links, paste0("[github](", p$github, ")"))
  if (!is.na(p$osf)    && p$osf    != "") links <- c(links, paste0("[osf](", p$osf, ")"))

  # Abstract
  has_abstract <- "abstract" %in% names(p) &&
                  !is.na(p$abstract) &&
                  nchar(trimws(as.character(p$abstract))) > 0
  abs_id <- paste0("abs-", row_id)

  if (has_abstract) {
    abs_text <- trimws(as.character(p$abstract))
    abs_text <- gsub("\r?\n\r?\n", "</p><p>", abs_text)
    abs_text <- gsub("\r?\n", " ", abs_text)
    abstract_btn <- paste0(
      '<a class="abstract-toggle" data-bs-toggle="collapse" href="#', abs_id,
      '" role="button" aria-expanded="false">abstract</a>'
    )
    abstract_div <- paste0(
      '<div id="', abs_id, '" class="collapse abstract-body">',
      '<p>', abs_text, '</p>',
      '</div>'
    )
  } else {
    abstract_btn <- ""
    abstract_div <- ""
  }

  links_html <- if (length(links) > 0 || has_abstract) {
    link_items <- paste(sapply(links, function(l) {
      m <- regmatches(l, regexec("\\[(.+?)\\]\\((.+?)\\)", l))[[1]]
      paste0('<a href="', m[3], '">', m[2], '</a>')
    }), collapse = "")
    paste0(
      '<span class="pub-links">',
      link_items,
      abstract_btn,
      '</span>'
    )
  } else ""

  cat(paste0(
    '::: {.pub-entry}\n',
    title_link, '\\\n',
    p$author, '\\\n',
    '*', p$journaltitle, '*\\\n',
    links_html, '\n',
    abstract_div, '\n',
    ':::\n\n'
  ))
}
```


::: {.content-visible when-profile="en"}
### Pre-prints
(\*: *equal contribution*)
:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="es"}
### Pre-prints
(\*: *igual contribución*)
:::

```{r preprints, results='asis'}
#| echo: false

preprints <- gsheet2tbl("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1id1P5ke9ZJckr_6ePP84FOLeQPoHb57eitX7yaZ_l8A/edit#gid=1000751275") %>%
  filter(type == "pre-print") %>%
  mutate(author = str_replace_all(author, "G. Solovey", "**G. Solovey**"))

for (i in seq_len(nrow(preprints))) {
  render_entry(preprints[i, ], use_pdf_col = FALSE, row_id = paste0("pre", i))
}
```


::: {.content-visible when-profile="en"}
### Publications
(\*: *equal contribution*)
:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="es"}
### Publicaciones
(\*: *contribuyeron igualitariamente*)
:::

```{r pubs, results='asis'}
#| echo: false

pubs <- gsheet2tbl("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1id1P5ke9ZJckr_6ePP84FOLeQPoHb57eitX7yaZ_l8A/edit#gid=1000751275") %>%
  filter(type == "Article") %>%
  mutate(author = str_replace_all(author, "G. Solovey", "**G. Solovey**")) %>%
  arrange(desc(year))

pub_counter <- 0
for (yr in unique(pubs$year)) {
  cat(paste0("#### ", yr, "\n\n"))
  yr_pubs <- filter(pubs, year == yr)
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(yr_pubs))) {
    pub_counter <- pub_counter + 1
    render_entry(yr_pubs[i, ], use_pdf_col = TRUE, row_id = paste0("pub", pub_counter))
  }
}
```
